title: No date-range filter test in BDD suite
evidence: tests/bdd.rs — date_from/date_to params exercised implicitly through search_matches but no dedicated test isolates date range filtering
suggestion: Add a test that filters matches by date_from and date_to to explicitly validate R4 date range functionality

title: Dedup key excludes match date — potential false merges
evidence: src/model.rs:80-90 dedup_key() omits date field; comment explains timezone shift rationale but two distinct fixtures with same teams/score/season/competition would merge
suggestion: Monitor for unexpected row-count loss after dedup; the design choice is documented and deliberate

title: Low maintainability scorer output (0.45) despite clean architecture
evidence: retort.db maintainability=0.4497; likely penalized for 2012-line codebase in 7 source files with some long functions (data.rs load functions)
suggestion: Consider splitting CSV loaders into separate modules if maintainability score matters for cross-run comparison
